meaning: n.鎽婇攢,鎽婅繕,鍒嗘湡鍋夸粯n.鍒嗘湡鍋胯繕
examples: The latter will have high amounts of goodwill amortization.
Banpu's offer is priced at 11.16 times Centennial's earnings before interest, tax, depreciation and amortization.
The life of a machine and related amortization costs, are related to the amount of time the machine was running.
Merrill Lynch figured it was priced at 16 times operating income (earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization).
Currently, teams essentially cannot have debt exceed 10 times earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization.
